title: R3-002 governed work object contracts
summary: Deliver the canonical contract layer for Project, Milestone, Task, and Bug.

lineage.rationale: The R3 milestone brief explicitly opens R3-002 as the next gated step.

evidence.summary: Kanban defines the milestone objective and done criteria.

audit.notes: Milestone boundary checked against active-state and kanban truth.

scope_summary: Define governed work object contracts and invariants only.
objective: Make the work-object contract layer durable without starting storage or flow implementation.
done_criteria: Project, Milestone, Task, and Bug contracts exist.
Invariant rules are explicit and validated.
non_goals: Request Brief or Task Packet contracts
